SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: ROUBINIAN, LEON V. SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR JACKMAN, FRED

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT LEONID TOLSTUNOV'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT. NO EXPRESS CONTRACT PROVIDED, NO OFFER OR ACCEPTANCE PROPERLY ALLEGED. SEE MCKINNEY V. NASH (1981) 120 CAL APP 3D 428. THIS ACTION IS STAYED PENDING RESOLUTION OF THE SMALL CLAIMS CASE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-25-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carolyn Gyermek (464.8888) for defendant and moving party

No other appearances. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT LEONID TOLSTUNOV'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend as to 2nd cause of action for breach of contract. No express contract provided, no offer or acceptance properly alleged. See McKinney v. Nash (1981) 120 Cal App 3d 428. This action is stayed pending resolution of the small claims case. Order signed in open court. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
